expansion_backlog.description: Add additional state-level rows for non-CA jurisdictions to harden longitudinal coverage.
Grow sampled manual audits from 31 to 45 rows while keeping stratification guarantees.
Increase windmill_live share for policy families that still run in mixed mode.

C0.reason: Corpus scope and composition satisfy C0.

C1.reason: Official-source dominance and Tavily/Exa primary caps satisfy C1.

C10.reason: C10 licensing/robots/ToS posture is documented for all rows.

C11.reason: C11 schema/taxonomy/gate version contract is explicit and aligned.

C12.reason: C12 known-policy coverage includes blind holdout and adequate coverage.

C13.reason: C13 has orchestration intent metadata, but live Windmill run/job refs are not proven.

C14.reason: C14 non-fee extraction depth is incomplete.

C2.reason: C2 structured-source diversity/depth requirements not met.

C3.reason: C3 package classifications reconcile cleanly with D11 handoff quality.

C4.reason: C4 economic handoff distribution thresholds are satisfied.

C5.reason: C5 manual audit sampling is stratified and complete.

C6.reason: C6 golden regression fields are complete and taxonomy-versioned.

C7.reason: C7 freshness/drift metadata is complete and visible.

C8.reason: C8 identity/dedupe canonical fields are present.

C9.reason: C9 normalized/exportable fields are present across corpus rows.

C9a.reason: C9a product surface contract and query examples are present.

next_eval_blocker.reason: C2 structured-source diversity/depth requirements not met.
